comments.text: Submitted mine yesterday. Thanks for the reminder!
Done ✅ paid this morning via UPI

feeds.text: 📢 Important update — March maintenance collection closes on 10th. If you haven't submitted your proof yet, please do it today. Pending approvals will be processed within 24 hours. Thank you for your cooperation!
The terrace garden looks absolutely stunning this evening! 🌸 Someone has done a great job with the new flower pots near the entrance. Really lifts the mood coming home after a long day.

comments.text: Thank you Priya! We sourced those from the nursery near gate no. 2 🌿
Agreed, looks so fresh. Good work team 👍
Good to know. Thanks for the heads up Arjun.
Expense already raised. Should be resolved by tomorrow evening.

feeds.text: ⚠️ Alert: The D-wing CCTV camera (near staircase) is currently offline for repair. The technician is scheduled for tomorrow morning. Security guard has been briefed to increase rounds in that area until it is fixed.

Just returned from the Holi celebration in the parking area — what a fantastic event! 🎉 The colours, the music, the food stalls — everything was perfectly organised. Huge thanks to the committee and all volunteers who made it happen. We're lucky to have such a vibrant community 🙏

comments.text: Best Holi in Krishnam Dham so far! 🌈
The gujiya was amazing 😍 please share the vendor contact!
Will post the vendor list shortly Meena!

feeds.text: Gentle reminder to all residents — please do not park in front of the fire exit near B-wing basement. It was blocked for almost 2 hours this morning. This is a safety hazard and could attract a fire department notice for the entire society.

comments.text: Noted Meena. I've put up a notice board at the spot. Repeat violations will be towed.

feeds.text: Congratulations to Krishnam Dham on completing 5 years! 🏆 It has been such a journey — from an empty building to this amazing community. Grateful to every neighbour, admin and security uncle who made this place feel like home.

comments.text: 5 wonderful years! Here's to many more 🥂
Time flies! Great community 🙌
Absolutely! Proud to call this home ❤️
That's a great step. We needed stricter gate control.
Good move 👍

feeds.text: The new security guards have now been fully briefed on gate protocol. Entry without prior visitor registration will not be allowed after 9 PM. Please ensure you register expected guests via the Visitors module in advance to avoid inconvenience.

Hi everyone, is anyone else's ceiling fan making a rattling noise? Mine started this week. Wondering if it's building-wide vibration or just my unit. Any electrician recommendation from neighbours would be helpful!

comments.text: Same issue in B-109! Has been rattling for 2 days now.
Try Ravi Electricals near gate no.1 — very reliable and charges fair.
Thanks Deepak! Will call them tomorrow.
Great news! The lift in F-wing was a bit shaky last month.

feeds.text: Elevator maintenance has been completed on both lifts. The AMC has been renewed for 12 months. Service logs are available at the admin office. Please report any unusual sounds or delays immediately instead of waiting for the next scheduled check.

comments.text: Count me in! This is such a lovely idea 🙌
I'm interested too. Will 6:30 AM work for weekdays?
Yes please! Need this 😄
Wonderful! I'll share a WhatsApp group link soon 🙏

feeds.text: Anyone interested in starting a morning yoga session on the rooftop? Thinking Tuesdays and Thursdays 6:30–7:15 AM. No charges, just community wellness. Drop a comment if interested and I'll set it up 🧘

comments.text: On it Seema. The plumber has been called. Should be resolved by noon.
Plumber checked — inlet valve was partially closed. Fixed now.
Pressure is back, thank you!

feeds.text: The water pressure in D-wing has been very low since yesterday morning, especially on floors 2 and above. Has anyone raised a complaint? It's becoming difficult to even fill a bucket. Admin please look into this urgently.

comments.text: I'll check with the security uncle and let you know Ramesh.

feeds.text: Lost: One black umbrella with a brown handle, last seen near the letterbox area on the ground floor, Sunday evening. If anyone finds it please keep it at the security desk. My contact is 9644556677. Thank you.

comments.text: The benches are wonderful! My kids love the play area now 😊
It looks so much better now. Keep it up Nidhi 👏

feeds.text: 🌿 Society Garden Update: We've planted 18 new seasonal flower plants along the walking path. The garden committee also added two new benches near the children's play area. A big thank you to all volunteers who turned up on Saturday morning!

Reminder to all pet owners: please clean up after your dogs in the common area, especially near the B-wing garden path. There have been multiple incidents this week. Let's be responsible so the management doesn't have to impose restrictions 🙏

comments.text: Agreed. We will put up signage this week. Thank you Sunita for raising this.
Well said. It's basic civic sense.
Great tip Kavya! Will try this.
My mother does this every summer 😄 Works really well!

feeds.text: Sharing a home remedy that's been working wonders — boil neem leaves and spray around your flat entrance to keep mosquitoes away. With the rains approaching, this is a good precaution. Stay safe everyone 🌿

Three new security personnel have joined the Krishnam Dham team from March 1st. The shift rotation schedule has been updated and is available at the gate desk. Please cooperate with them as they settle in. Any concerns can be raised directly to the admin office.

comments.text: Good to hear. We needed more hands at the gate 👍
My daughter performed in the dance — she was so excited! ❤️
Lovely event. Same time next year! 🎉

feeds.text: Republic Day celebrations in the society were wonderful! 🇮🇳 The flag hoisting ceremony was followed by a small cultural programme by the kids. Felt very proud. Thank you to everyone who organised it despite the tight schedule.

comments.text: Best Diwali memory of my life! 🙏
The catering was so good! Which vendor did admin hire?
Happy Diwali to all! Will share vendor details in a separate post 🪔

feeds.text: Diwali night in Krishnam Dham was nothing short of magical 🪔✨ Every balcony lit up, the rangoli competition was so creative, and the fireworks display was breathtaking. Special mention to everyone in A-wing for the rooftop lanterns — absolutely stunning!

comments.text: Raised a service request. Electrician will check tomorrow morning.
Thank you Arjun! Appreciate the quick response.

feeds.text: Has anyone noticed the street light near the parking lot exit is broken? It's been dark near the gate for the past 3 nights. Can we get this fixed quickly — it is a safety concern especially for residents returning late at night.

comments.text: Welcome everyone! Let's make this a positive and respectful space 🙌
Finally! Been waiting for something like this 😊

feeds.text: Welcome to the Krishnam Dham Community Feed! 🏠 This is our space to share updates, celebrate moments, raise concerns and stay connected as neighbours. Feel free to post anything relevant to our community. Looking forward to a vibrant and helpful space 🙏
